name: Ransomware: Ryuk IOC in Events
notes:
This rule triggers when an IOC (File Hash) related to Ryuk Ransomware is observed.

Note: Ryuk_SHA256, Ryuk_SHA1 and Ryuk_MD5 have been prepopulated. Tune these Reference Sets with relevant IOC.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event matches "MD5 Hash" is NOT NULL OR "SHA256 Hash" is NOT null OR "SHA1 Hash"is NOT NULL OR "Filename" is NOT NULL AQL filter query
when the event matches REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Ryuk_MD5', "MD5 Hash") or REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Ryuk_SHA256', "SHA256 Hash") or REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Ryuk_SHA1', "SHA1 Hash") AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Ransomware: Ryuk IOC in Events on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event matches "MD5 Hash" is NOT NULL OR "SHA256 Hash" is NOT null OR "SHA1 Hash"is NOT NULL OR "Filename" is NOT NULL AQL filter query
AND when the event matches REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Ryuk_MD5', "MD5 Hash") or  REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Ryuk_SHA256', "SHA256 Hash") or REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Ryuk_SHA1', "SHA1 Hash") AQL filter query
RED_list: Event description: An IOC (File Hash) related to Ryuk Ransomware has been observed.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
